elements.original_description: A minimalist illustration of the word 'In' in bold, modern typography, centered on a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon featuring the word 'In' in bold, modern typography, perfectly centered on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, absolutely no shading, gradients, or decorative elements. Crisp edges, minimalist style.

elements.original_description: An illustration of a stack of coins and a dollar bill, symbolizing 'financial', placed neatly on a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: A minimalist 2D flat illustration of a stack of coins and a single dollar bill, symbolizing 'financial', arranged neatly on a pure white background. Clean, professional flat vector art style with high contrast and sharp lines. No shading, no gradients, no texture. Simple, clear, and visually balanced.
